title: Weekly Mood Pattern Analysis
subtitle: Your mood patterns over the past week show positive trends

content.text:
Weekly Mood Pattern Analysis

Your mood scores this week averaged 72 out of 100, showing a 5% improvement from last week.
content.headline: Weekly Mood Pattern Analysis
content.body: Your mood scores this week averaged 72 out of 100, showing a 5% improvement from last week. The data suggests consistent emotional stability with positive peaks on weekends.
content.mantra: Emotional consistency is key to well-being

content.text:
Daily Breakdown

Monday (68): Started the week with moderate mood
Wednesday (75): Mid-week peak
Friday (78): Strong end-of-week mood
content.headline: Daily Breakdown
content.body: Your mood fluctuated throughout the week with a clear pattern. Mondays tend to be lower (68), but you achieve peak levels by Friday (78). This suggests you thrive towards the end of the work week.

content.text:
Mood Influencers

Sleep Quality: +15% impact on mood
Social Interaction: +12% impact
Work Stress: -18% impact
content.headline: Key Mood Influencers
content.body: Analysis reveals that sleep quality has the strongest positive impact on your mood (15% correlation). Social interactions also boost mood by 12%, while work-related stress has an 18% negative impact.

content.text:
Recommendations

1. Maintain consistent sleep schedule
2. Plan weekly social activities
3. Take regular breaks from work
content.headline: Actionable Recommendations
content.body: Based on this analysis, we recommend: maintaining a consistent sleep schedule (7-9 hours), planning at least 3 social activities per week, and taking 5-minute breaks every hour during work.
content.mantra: Small consistent habits create big changes
